hero.title: ZNote - Write the IP, Get the Shell
hero.description:
_"The IP whose name is written in this note shall have its shell popped."_ 

Technical explorations, lab reports, and threat analysis by **Zcook**. Cybersecurity & AI Master's student, focused on infrastructure and offensive security.

ctf.title: CTF & Challenges
ctf.description: Detailed analysis of Capture The Flag competitions and training platforms.

pentest.title: Pentesting Labs
pentest.description: Intrusion reports on target machines (HTB, THM) and vulnerable environments.

network.title: Infrastructure & Network
network.description: Architecture, virtualization, and securing of complex networks.

walkthroughs.title: Off-Log
walkthroughs.description: In-depth tutorials on tools, protocols, and cyber best practices.

about.title: About the author
about.description1: Hi! I'm **Zcook**. Currently a Cybersecurity & AI Master's student at ESATIC, I spend my free time exploring protocols, virtualizing complex networks, and studying modern attack vectors.
about.description2: This blog is my technical logbook: a space where I document my labs, my delirium, and my adventures in the world of offensive security.
